backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Jackman town website backend, implementing user profile management, event/announcement CRUD, contact form submission, and static town info, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping each product feature (homepage, about, services, events, recreation, contact) to their implementing frontend files, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, covering styles, config, pages, components, and hooks for the Jackman Maine town website.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, primary, destructive, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Jackman Maine Town Website' and mounting the app into a root div via the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with a shared Layout (Navigation + Footer) and defines six client-side routes: Home, About, Services, Events, Recreation, and Contact.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component rendering a three-column grid with brand info, quick navigation links, and contact details, plus a copyright line and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM parameters.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with a Jackman logo/brand, desktop nav links with active-state highlighting, a mobile hamburger menu, and an Internet Identity-based Admin Login/Logout button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including events, town contact info, messages, and user profile/admin status, all built on top of useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a Northern Maine-themed CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying town history, quick facts, and descriptive content about Jackman, Maine, with a logo and icon-based fact list.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page that fetches town address and phone number from the backend and provides a form for submitting messages, with loading and success state handling.
frontend/src/pages/EventsPage.tsx: React page for displaying, adding, and deleting community events, with admin-only controls gated by Internet Identity authentication. Includes an EventCard component and an AddEventForm that converts dates to nanosecond timestamps for the backend.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for the Jackman, Maine town website featuring a hero image, quick navigation links, and highlight cards for outdoor activities. Uses TanStack Router Links and Lucide icons.
frontend/src/pages/RecreationPage.tsx: Static informational page listing outdoor recreation activities available in Jackman, Maine (snowmobiling, fishing, hiking, etc.) with descriptions and highlights for each activity.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Static page displaying Jackman town municipal services (town office, emergency services, public works, etc.) with contact info, hours, and an emergency 911 banner.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, content paths, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Source Sans 3), and an extended color palette using oklch values for forest, slate, amber, and semantic UI colors.
project_state.json: Project state file describing a town website for Jackman, Maine (ZIP 04945), including versioning, architectural notes, required images, and a list of existing features covering homepage, about, services, events, recreation, contact, and visual theme sections.
